bug_descriptions.C02: Adds bare 'ref' to tracking params despite the comment explaining GitHub ?ref=main names a resource; distinct sources now merge to one root.
bug_descriptions.C03: Drops the '/' fallback: a bare-domain URL canonicalizes without trailing slash, changing existing root ids.
bug_descriptions.C04: removeprefix('doi:') does not strip uppercase 'DOI:'; such origins get a doubled 'doi:doi:' prefix.
bug_descriptions.C07: CREATE INDEX on observations(root_id) runs in _SCHEMA before the legacy-table ALTER migration, so opening a pre-root_id store crashes. (Designed as safe; the construction check reclassified it.)
bug_descriptions.C08: Boundary mutation: confidence 0.0 (valid, means certain-false rating floor) is now rejected.
bug_descriptions.C09: Upsert no longer updates source_type on conflict; docstring above still promises it is overwritten.
bug_descriptions.C12: VALUES tuple transposed: confidence is stored in the modality column and modality in confidence.
